name: lobu-monorepo
description: Deploy autonomous AI agents with sandboxing, network isolation, and multi-platform access.

scripts.build: cd packages/core && bun run build && cd ../gateway && bun run build && cd ../worker && bun run build && cd ../..
scripts.test: bun test packages/core/src packages/gateway/src packages/worker/src packages/landing/src
scripts.test:coverage: bun test packages/core/src packages/gateway/src packages/worker/src packages/landing/src --coverage
scripts.build:packages: cd packages/core && bun run build && cd ../gateway && bun run build && cd ../worker && bun run build && cd ../cli && bun run build
scripts.build:owletto: cd packages/owletto-sdk && bun run build && cd ../owletto-embeddings && bun run build && cd ../owletto-cli && bun run build && cd ../..
scripts.test:packages: cd packages/core && bun run test && cd ../gateway && bun run test && cd ../worker && bun run test
scripts.test:owletto: cd packages/owletto-cli && bun run runtime:prepare && cd ../..
scripts.typecheck:packages: cd packages/core && bun run typecheck && cd ../gateway && bun run typecheck && cd ../worker && bun run typecheck
scripts.typecheck:owletto: cd packages/owletto-backend && bun run typecheck && cd ../owletto-cli && bun run typecheck && cd ../owletto-embeddings && bun run typecheck && cd ../owletto-sdk && bun run typecheck && cd ../..
scripts.docker:build: docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.gateway -t lobu-gateway . && docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.worker -t lobu-worker .
